name: fleet safety officers managing 10-20 vehicles tool
description: For fleet safety officers managing 10-20 vehicles, inefficient scheduling of driver log audits causes compliance delays. We automate scheduling and reporting instead of manual scheduling and reporting processes.

features: manual log entry for driver audits
